title: Luffy Looks for Enel
description: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Is it not reliant on any manpower...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How the hell is it flying....!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is it really not gonna crash down?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What the hell are we gonna do!?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: The sky is... becoming darker and darker...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Set sail for the white seas!

summary: Luffy fights his way back toward Enel while Nami, Aisa, and the remaining survivors look for a way through the coming destruction.
